message:
feat(config): add DataDir to DaemonConfig with path helper methods

Replace hardcoded /var/lib/stockyard paths with config-driven paths
to enable testing with temp directories and flexible deployments.

- Add DataDir field to DaemonConfig (defaults to /var/lib/stockyard)
- Add VMDir() helper to compute VM state directory path
- Add DHCPLeaseFile() helper to compute DHCP lease file path
- Update gc.go and resources.go to use config helper methods
- Update daemon.go to pass DataDir to DHCP server

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,7 +57,7 @@ Note: This command will NOT clean up running VMs - they must be stopped first.`,
 
 		gc := &GarbageCollector{
 			cfg:          cfg,
-			vmDir:        "/var/lib/stockyard/vms/stockyard",
+			vmDir:        cfg.VMDir(),
 			taskIDs:      make(map[string]string),
 			dryRun:       gcDryRun || (!gcAll && !gcOrphans),
 			cleanAll:     gcAll,

@@ -60,8 +60,8 @@ DHCP leases, and identify orphaned resources that are not tracked by the daemon.
 		// Collect resources from various sources
 		rc := &ResourceCollector{
 			cfg:       cfg,
-			vmDir:     "/var/lib/stockyard/vms/stockyard",
-			leaseFile: "/var/lib/stockyard/dnsmasq.leases",
+			vmDir:     cfg.VMDir(),
+			leaseFile: cfg.DHCPLeaseFile(),
 			taskIDs:   make(map[string]string),
 			taskInfo:  make(map[string]*TaskInfo),
 			macToIP:   make(map[string]string),
